goal: Google login did nothing on daily/home/decks — popup button fired but no OAuth started
root_cause: The Supabase config (window.__MEOWTAROT_SUPABASE__) is only inlined in profile.html + reading.html. The sign-in gate also opens from daily/home/decks (deck pill, 'Save your fortune' chip), but those pages had NO config → readSupabaseConfig() returned empty → isAuthConfigured() false → getSupabaseClient() null → loginWithProvider threw AUTH_CONFIG_ERROR, swallowed by the gate's onSignIn .catch → click fired (overlay closed) but nothing happened. (The earlier Supabase redirect-allowlist wildcard fix was necessary too, but insufficient alone.)
fix: auth.js readSupabaseConfig now falls back to hardcoded public SUPABASE_URL_FALLBACK + SUPABASE_ANON_KEY_FALLBACK (the anon key is RLS-gated and already public in the inlined HTML), so EVERY page can init the client and start auth.
verified: chrome MCP live /daily: elementFromPoint = the button (no overlay), click fired + overlay closed but URL stayed (no client). After fix on localhost /daily: window.__MEOWTAROT_SUPABASE__ absent yet isAuthConfigured()=true and getSupabaseClient() returns a client. md5 parity canonical=www=ios.
notes: Pairs with the Supabase redirect-URL allowlist wildcard (added via dashboard) — both needed for web login. Founder: retest on live after deploy + Cloudflare cache refresh.
